name: Nix via Host Daemon
description: Use the host's Nix daemon and /nix/store from inside a devcontainer. Zero download; every container on the same host shares one store. Designed for a devhost-style Hyper-V / remote NixOS machine that SSH-hosts your devcontainers.

enableDirenv.description: Install a bash/zsh hook for direnv so `.envrc` files (e.g. `use flake`) auto-load nix devshells.

hostNixBinDir.description: Path inside the container where the host's nix + pre-installed tools appear. Prepended to PATH. The default matches the symlink created by this repo's hosts/devhost/nix-share.nix.
